summary: Completed comprehensive testing of UGG Platform - Universal Gaming Gateway. Backend APIs fully functional (100% success rate), frontend pages load correctly with proper navigation, but session persistence needs attention.

ui_bugs.issue: Shows 0 device badges despite 85 devices available in API

integration_issues.issue: JWT cookies expire quickly causing frequent redirects to login page

issues: Minor HTML structure warning in Emulator Lab - span inside option element

passed_tests: Login with admin@ugg.io / admin123 works correctly
Dashboard loads with all summary cards (Devices, Alerts, Commands, Events)
Dashboard shows Live Event Feed and Alert ticker
Navigation to all 8 pages works (Devices, Connectors, AI Studio, Emulator Lab, Alerts, Audit Explorer, Messages, Settings)
Devices page shows 85 device rows with filters
Connectors page shows three-pane builder layout
AI Studio shows chat interface with Gemini integration
Emulator Lab shows scenario selector and run button
Audit Explorer shows audit records table with filters
Settings page shows platform stats with tabs
All 24 backend API endpoints return correct status codes
Device detail drawer opens and shows tabs
Summary cards are clickable and navigate correctly
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix session persistence issue - JWT cookies are expiring too quickly causing frequent login redirects. Investigate Device Health Map data loading issue showing 0 badges despite 85 devices in API.
